description: Style NoteA driving shoe that understands your feet and gives your look a refined twist, this pair from red tape is a closet essential. The slip-on styling helps you wear this pair with ease and keeps your feet comfy as well.Product DetailsBrown square toed slip-on shoes with stitch detail at the seams of the toe boxHas a cushioned insoleTPU outsole in the form grooved geometrical lugsMaterial and CareLeatherClean with a leather brushDo not store under sunlight or wash
